policy: New or changed files must stay within scope limits. Existing exceptions are frozen at their recorded size and must not grow.

scopes.reason: frontend modules should stay small enough for focused review and agent editing
frontend tests and mocks should stay grouped by behavior or user surface
taxonomy files are structured data lists and may be larger than logic modules
Rust modules should stay cohesive and split before becoming hard to review
Rust tests should stay focused by behavior or platform surface
scripts should be small or split into named checks and helpers
script tests should stay focused by checked rule family
large active docs should be split by product boundary and linked from an index
configuration should stay compact and explicit
checked-in schema migrations may be longer than logic modules
Agent Skill entrypoints stay short and use progressive disclosure references
